name: orcalayer-mcp
description: MCP server for the OrcaLayer API — Polymarket whale and market analytics for Claude and other MCP clients
long_description: OrcaLayer exposes Polymarket smart-money analytics over MCP. Rank profitable whales, inspect any wallet's profile and open positions, search markets where smart money is clustering, and stream recent whale trades (Premium). Built on 1.2B+ on-chain Polygon fills with farmer/hedger filtering, NegRisk correction and FIFO P&L. Four public tools work anonymously; whale_alerts needs a Premium API key.

api_key.title: OrcaLayer API Key
api_key.description: Optional Premium API key from orcalayer.com/pricing (enables the whale_alerts tool). Public tools work without it.
